things.name: Strasbourg Cathedral
things.description: Sandstone Gothic masterpiece with an astronomical clock and platform views over the city

things.name: Petite France
things.description: Enchanting medieval quarter with half-timbered houses reflected in the Ill canals

things.name: Palais Rohan
things.description: Grand 18th-century bishop's palace housing three exceptional museums

things.name: Barrage Vauban
things.description: Huge defensive dam with roof terrace offering superb views of the old town

things.name: European Parliament
things.description: Official seat of the European Parliament with free guided tours when in session

things.name: Musee d'Art Moderne et Contemporain
things.description: Outstanding modern art collection in a glass-and-steel building on the banks of the Ill

things.name: Neustadt
things.description: UNESCO-listed German Imperial district with magnificent Belle Epoque architecture

things.name: Musee Alsacien
things.description: Delightful museum of Alsatian folk art and traditions in interconnected historic houses

things.name: Christmas Market
things.description: One of Europe's oldest Christmas markets, held annually since 1570 around the cathedral

things.name: Parc de l'Orangerie
things.description: Elegant park with storks, pony rides and a boating lake near the European institutions
